creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thomas Schweikle from comment #0)
> The server is reachable if the given proxy where used. Seems this part of
> the system ignores proxy variables. In tune fetching fails.

pkg(8) uses fetch(3) just like fetch(1) does and supports the same proxy variables.

Can you share the relevant parts of your environment, as well as a log demonstrating that 'fetch -vvv' works with the same URL in the same environment?
